title: Public Equity Investing idea funnel dashboard
subtitle: Synthetic strict-mode example for candidate triage.

metadata.decision_context: Which names deserve immediate research follow-up.

hero.headline: The screen surfaces a small number of research-worthy candidates
hero.dek: The dashboard separates candidates, watchlist items, and rejected false positives.
hero.callout: Prioritize follow-up, not final trade recommendations.

snapshot.label: Top Candidate
snapshot.detail: Best combination of catalyst path and valuation setup in the synthetic screen.

snapshot.label: Readiness
snapshot.detail: No candidate is implementation-ready without live market refresh.

data.label: PM triage
data.summary: The screen produces research candidates, not recommendations; ACME Software should move to comps and earnings work first.
data.next_catalyst: Refresh market data and validate the catalyst path.

rows.Why now: Valuation compression plus near-term product catalyst.
rows.First rejection risk: Consensus refresh may already embed the catalyst.

rows.Why now: Margin inflection is possible but evidence is thin.
rows.First rejection risk: Consumer demand data may remain weak.

questions.question: Does live consensus already price the catalyst?
questions.why: It determines whether the idea is variant or merely visible.

questions.question: Which rejected names failed because of data quality rather than thesis quality?
questions.why: It controls what gets parked on the watchlist.

items: Live market data, liquidity, borrow, options, and consensus fields need refresh before any trade pitch.
Rejected candidates need source-backed rejection notes before archival.
